name: required-field-missing
notes: agent_id field is absent. JCS canonicalizes any syntactically valid JSON object; it does not enforce schema presence. The partial preimage produces a distinct canonical form and digest (expected_divergent_digest). FAIL outcome depends entirely on producer-side or verifier-side validation: the schema MUST require all four canonical fields to be present before canonicalization is invoked. If validation is skipped, a verifier matching only against expected_divergent_digest would silently accept an unsigned action attribution. This vector documents the verifier-loud failure path (explicit mismatch) and its complement (silent acceptance risk when field presence is not enforced).
